title: Pow(x, n)
description: Implement pow(x, n) , which calculates x raised to the power n (i.e., x n ).   Example 1: Input: x = 2.00000, n = 10 Output: 1024.00000 Example 2: Input: x = 2.10000, n = 3 Output: 9.26100 Example 3: Input: x = 2.00000, n = -2 Output: 0.25000 Explanation: 2 -2 = 1/2 2 = 1/4 = 0.25   Constraints: -100.0 < x < 100.0 -2 31 <= n <= 2 31 -1 n is an integer. Either x is not zero or n > 0 . -10 4 <= x n <= 10 4
